topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that manage irrigation systems based on environmental conditions, user commands, and scheduling, aiming to optimize water usage and prevent waste.

rows.if_then_rule: IF Every day at from Date & Time THEN Start watering a zone using Rachio for a specific number of minutes.
